column3: Playing board games with friends is a great cafe pastime.
A cafe can make a business meeting more casual and less dull.
You can even watch news programmes in cafes these days.
A cafe should be quiet if it wants to attract readers.
The best cafes are those located near busy pedestrian streets.
The decor of a cafe can make of break its business.
A town should have a variety of cafes for every taste.
